posts.title: useful
posts.text: always used command Linux统计file1中有，file2中没有的行: file1-file2 1grep -vFf file2 file1 查看quota 1/usr/sbin/xfs_quota -c 'quota -h' 文件首位见字符 12sed "s/^/HEAD&/g" test.filesed "s/$/&TAIL/g" test.file 根据关键词提取行 1awk '/XXX/{print $1}' file 删掉第一列 1awk '{$1="";print $0}' file 大写转小写 1cat file | tr A-Z a-z > newfile 选取10-100行 1sed -n '10,100p' 在文件开头添加内容 1sed -i '1i\This is the beginning' file kaldi特征拼接 1paste-feats scp:... scp:... ark,scp:... 查看网络 1nnet3-info 划分数据集 1utils/split_data.sh data 16

pages.title: group meeting
pages.text: log10/02/2023 TODO15/03/2023 add LM for Dbank, JCMC, Torgo add decoder for UA, Dbank, JCMC, Torgo for UA, use other pre-trained models, like hu-bert, wavlm, data2vec2, whisper(can not) re-score different fusion methods 10/02/2023 Wav2vec2.0 model: a) add LM; b) add decoder backend: a) feature fusion; b) double w2v representations JCMC + ult: ult_tdnnf_layers linear(18.84),2(18.83),3(18.87),4(18.95),5(18.82),6(18.84),7(19.00) ult_fusion_position input(18.93),tdnnf_layer[1-14]: 2(18.84), 5(18.86), 11(19.04), 13(19.01) fusion: dev a_aw_awu 0.4_0.3_0.3 18.82 test a_aw_awu 19/02/2023lhuc_sat+adapter on 30.6h UASpeech: 1 layer, on 4th transformer block. The WER of LHUC-SAT is 31.51%, when lr=3e-5. The WER of test adaption is 29.67% when lr=1e-4. The all improvement are from seen words. how about before the transformer block, i.e. after CNN how about multi layers on 130.1h UASpeech: start from 30.6h LHUC-SAT model(lr=3e-5), lr=1e-5, WER is 29.59% when lr=1e-4. start from 30.6h LHUC-SAT model(lr=1e-5), lr=1e-5, WER is 29.02% when lr=1e-4. start from 30.6h model(lr=1e-5), lr=1e-5, WER is 28.92% when lr=1e-4. from scratch, no used xlsr on UASpeech on 30.6h UASpeech: wav2vec2-large-xlsr-53 lr=1e-5, WER: 40.77% wav2vec2-large-xlsr-53-english lr=1e-5, WER: wav2vec2-xls-r-300m wav2vec2-xls-r-1b-english 26/03/2023 只有用lm解码的时候用到transf_new，其他都是transf dbank conformer wav2vec2 + 6 layer decoder, only AED loss (epoch = 10) update all, update decoder lr = 5e-3 NaN lr = 1e-3, WER = 71.21% lr = 3e-4, WER = 72.55% lr = 3e-5, WER = dbank conformer wav2vec2 + 1 layer decoder, only AED loss update decoder dbank conformer wav2vec2 + 2 layer decoder, only AED loss update decoder lr = 1e-4, WER = 75.24% Problem12/02/2023TDNN-F, JCMC_w2v_fbk_ult训练时遇到 123ASSERTION_FAILED (nnet3-chain-train[5.5.208~23-b0fc0]:ConstrainOrthonormalInternal():nnet-utils.cc:980) : 'ratio > 0.999' 原因：在kaldi的具体实现中(kaldi/src/nnet3/nnet-utils.cc:ConstrainOrthonormalInternal()),为避免当M的奇异值之间差异较大导致的发散，通过减半学习率来减小发散风险；具体分析过程为：tr(P)为矩阵P奇异值(均为正)的和；tr(PP.T)为矩阵P奇异值的平方和；则奇异值mean=tr(P)/dim；且有tr(PP.T)>=dim*(tr(P)/dim)^2,即dim*tr(PP.T)>=tr(P)^2；则有ratio=tr(PP.T)*dim/tr(P)^2>=1.ratio>1时,ratio越大表明奇异值差异性越大，越容易造成发散；所以，当ratio>1.02时,调整学习率ν=ν*0.5来降低发散风险.这里dim从296变成了440.解决方法：降低学习率问题：学习率降低或许会导致性能变差发现：似乎学习率和所能完成的iteration成正比，比如学习率为0.0003，能完成227个；学习率为0.00025，能完成273个。227/5*6=272.4继续验证：lr为0.0002（340？bingo!），变成0.004（17？no，30！）；同时把ult_fusion位置换到其他位置，往前（4，30），往后（12，28），以及input层（貌似可行）；把ult_fusion变成linear（30）;append(30), ult_no_lda(30)最终：没用到的层应该注释掉，比如只有3层ult_tdnnf，那么后面4层都应该注释掉。
